mapper.sql: SELECT v.version_id, v.selection_id, v.student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no, v.stage_name, v.version_no, v.file_id, f.original_name AS file_name, f.file_size, f.mime_type, v.remark, v.status, v.reviewer_id, rev.real_name AS reviewer_name, v.review_comment, DATE_FORMAT(v.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS review_time, s.topic_id, pt.topic_name, s.custom_topic_name, s.is_custom_topic, s.teacher_id, tea.real_name AS teacher_name, tea.teacher_no, s.campus_name, s.academic_year, DATE_FORMAT(v.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time, DATE_FORMAT(v.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS update_time FROM doc_version v LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON v.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user stu ON v.student_id = stu.user_id AND stu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON s.topic_id = pt.topic_id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.user_id AND tea.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user rev ON v.reviewer_id = rev.user_id AND rev.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN doc_file f ON v.file_id = f.file_id AND f.is_deleted = 0 WHERE v.is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(v.version_id) FROM doc_version v LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON v.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user stu ON v.student_id = stu.user_id AND stu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON s.topic_id = pt.topic_id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE v.is_deleted = 0 AND s.teacher_id = #{req.teacherId}
AND s.academic_year LIKE CONCAT(#{req.academicYear}, '%')
AND v.stage_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.stageName}, '%')
AND (stu.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR stu.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR pt.topic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR v.stage_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%'))
